description: You are the Sales Operations Manager at GardenWorld. The company is starting a new initiative to sell directly to other botanical institutions. Create a new Business Partner Group named 'Botanical Gardens' with the Search Key 'BotGarden' using the default account schema. Register a new Business Partner named 'City Botanical Garden' (Search Key: 'CITY_BOTANICAL') as a customer assigned to the 'Botanical Gardens' group.
